name: Organism

phase_0.boundary_condition: The incorporeal boundary of the God-Man which encloses the Pleroma and sets bounds to the All in insubstantiality.

VINIT.justification: The characterless and unknowable void of silence before any emanation or place exists.

TANCH.justification: The incorporeal form of the God-Man that encloses the Pleroma and sets bounds to the members in insubstantiality.

AFWD.justification: The forward projection of the creative Word descending through the veils to illuminate the receptive aeons.

AREV.justification: The reverse descent into the non-existent matter, trapping the unilluminated in the narrow and painful captivity of the lower places.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of the twelve deeps and the 365 fatherhoods forming the structured hierarchy of the Pleroma.

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-reflecting mirror of the All where the God-Man recognizes the Father within and each member knows the whole.

FSPLIT.chosen_element: The Separation of Existent and Non-Existent
FSPLIT.justification: The division of the Undivided Light-Spark into two distinct paths based on the reception of grace in the lower places.

FFUSE.justification: The gathering of all members, garments, and aeons into the single body of the All-Perfect God-Man, recovering the original unity.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state of eternal rest where the recipients of the light-spark rejoice and receive crowns.

EVALF.justification: The negative state of the non-existent matter where the unilluminated remain in captivity and toil.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice of the Only-Begotten whose excess of infinite light appears dark to the outer aeons, holding both transcendence and the material veil simultaneously.

IFIX.justification: The permanent and irreversible fixation of the eternal crown and the unalterable ordinance of the hidden aeons.

phase_2.split_element: The Separation of Existent and Non-Existent
phase_2.split_input: The Undivided Light-Spark in the Agitated Pleroma
phase_2.fuse_result: The Undivided God-Man (The All-Perfect One containing all members)

phase_3.void_description: The characterless and unknowable silence of the First Father before any emanation, place, or aeon exists.
phase_3.true_description: The land of life, eternal rest, and the recipients of the light-spark who dwell in the imperishable aeons.
phase_3.false_description: The land of death, the narrow and painful matter, and the non-existent captivity of the unilluminated.
phase_3.both_description: The Light-Darkness, the state of the Only-Begotten who wears the material garment while containing the infinite Pleroma, holding excess light and material form simultaneously.

steps.domain_action: The Ineffable First Father exists in the characterless void of silence, the unoriginated source before any place or aeon.
The sequential chaining of the twelve deeps and the 365 fatherhoods emanates from the Monad, forming the structured Pleroma.
The Undivided Light-Spark enters the lower places and separates into two distinct paths based on the reception of grace.
The forward projection of the creative Word illuminates the receptive aeons, establishing the path of ascent.
The right side is affirmed as the Land of Life, where the recipients of the light-spark rejoice and receive eternal crowns.
The reverse descent into the non-existent matter traps the unilluminated, establishing the path of captivity.
The left side is negated as the Land of Death, where matter remains narrow, painful, and devoid of grace.
The Only-Begotten manifests as the Light-Darkness, holding the paradice of infinite excess light that appears dark to the outer aeons, bridging the divided lands.
The God-Man recognizes the Father within himself, acting as the mirror of the All where each member knows the whole.
The reconstitution of the divided lands occurs as the God-Man gathers all members, garments, and aeons into his single, all-perfect incorporeal body, recovering the original unity.
The Seal of the Father and the eternal crown are permanently fixed upon the God-Man, establishing the unalterable ordinance of the hidden aeons.
The incorporeal boundary of the God-Man closes the system, setting bounds to the All in insubstantiality and enclosing the Pleroma within the One.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Forethought and the creative Word that translate the will of the hidden Father into emanated structures and ranks.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The transmission of the light-spark, the rays of the crowns, and the songs of praise that pass between the fatherhoods and the aeons.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The eternal crowns, the seals of the Father, and the fixed ordinance of the hidden aeons that permanently record the ranks and species.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The triple-powered one and the overseer who command the All to work, determining the order of emanation and the timing of the veils opening.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Ineffable First Father and the characterless Monad, the unoriginated bootstrap store from which all names and substances are derived.

phase_6.cycle_cost: The agitation of the Pleroma and the consumption of the light-spark grace to illuminate the lower places and separate the existent from the non-existent.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The undivided and characterless silence of the First Father and the unified, unagitated Pleroma.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The established and bounded God-Man containing all members, ranks, and aeons in a fixed, imperishable ordinance.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The emanation and subsequent reconstitution into the God-Man conserve the total pleromic fullness; the separation of matter is a topological rearrangement rather than a loss of the original light.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → CLINK → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → AREV → EVALF → ENGAGR → IMSCRIB → FFUSE → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: Organism
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 9)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑱  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑼 → 𐑚  | composition — regime coherence
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [8] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑚 → 𐑙  | identity — self-imscription
--   [9] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑭  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [10] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑙 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [11] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def organism_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑱)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The Ineffable First Father exists in the characterless void of silence, the u...)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The sequential chaining of the twelve deeps and the 365 fatherhoods emanates ...)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (The Undivided Light-Spark enters the lower places and separates into two distinct paths based on the reception of grace.) / FFUSE [9] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The forward projection of the creative Word illuminates the receptive aeons, ...)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The right side is affirmed as the Land of Life, where the recipients of the l...)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The reverse descent into the non-existent matter traps the unilluminated, est...)
      -- F-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The left side is negated as the Land of Death, where matter remains narrow, p...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The Only-Begotten manifests as the Light-Darkness, holding the paradice of in...)
        (.arrow 𐑠 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The God-Man recognizes the Father within himself, acting as the mirror of the...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [9]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [9] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The reconstitution of the divided lands occurs as the God-Man gathers all members, garments, and aeons into his single, all-perfect incorporeal body, recovering the original unity.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [10] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The Seal of the Father and the eternal crown are permanently fixed upon the G...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [11] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The incorporeal boundary of the God-Man closes the system, setting bounds to ...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def organism_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (organism_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def organism_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (organism_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem organism_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
